Singing Steel Gauntlets  
 

Lore Item
Slot: HANDS
AC: 16
Effect: Enduring Breath (Worn, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 5.0 Size: SMALL
Class: BRD
Race: HUM ELF HEF VAH DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Singing Steel Gauntlets
Lore Item
Slot: HANDS
AC: 16
Effect: Enduring Breath (Worn, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 5.0 Size: SMALL
Class: BRD
Race: HUM ELF HEF VAH DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Plate
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):28, 144, 93
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:460 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:694
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-13 07:50:38
Page Updated:Tue Sep 3rd, 2024

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 1,400pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 45
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Karnor's Castle
NPC Name
decayed kylong Iksar
decayed prisoner
decayed soldier
skeletal lookout
skeletal protector


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Karnor's Castle


Uploaded September 6th, 2024 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
Recap
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2004 at 9:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760027742
View User Forum
Sage
585 posts
To recap the relevant points of these posts:

Drops from: Skeletal Guardian (only thing i've seen and heard of them dropping from, regardless of what it says up top)

Level for effect: Lvl 1 (again, disregard the info above). It's the only piece of Singing Steel armor that is not a clicky effect, nor is it a proc, it is a worn effect. Any level bard can equip this and breathe easy ... or not need to breathe rather.

Price: I've seen it for as low as 1100pp on Tholuxe Pealls, but usually 2k or more.

I just lost the roll on these while in a group camping the entrance area, only pulling from as far away as the left and right courtyards. My bard friend will be very sad since I would have given them to him rather than sell them.
▲ Page top
Cheapest EB item...
QuoteReply
# May 18 2003 at 1:03 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
Even at 750, ewhich is the highest they go for on my server (I found mine for 400 though), this are by far the chepaest permanent effect EB item you can buy. Trouble is, it's bard only, hehe.

Compare this to rebreathers or fishbone earrings that go for 2k or so, and it's a great deal for a bard.

Note, by the way, that description is wrong about needing to be level 45 to use the effect; you can use the effect at level 1.

Edited, Sun May 18 01:38:58 2003
▲ Page top
worn
QuoteReply
# Dec 30 2002 at 7:22 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966223422
18 posts
I am watching singing steel gauntlets at the bazaar for a while. the gauntlets sold are all specified "worn" after "Effect:Enduring Breath".
Does it mean this effect won't be proc ?
▲ Page top
RE: worn
QuoteReply
# Jun 27 2003 at 1:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
Yes. "Worn" on any item means you will only get the effect if the item is equipped. "Permanent(worn)" means the effect will be permanent as long as the item is equipped.

Note that the minimum level (45) to get the effect listed on this page is incorrect; you can get the effect from this at level 1. It is the only piece of singing steel that has no minimum to use the effect; all other pieces have a minimum level of 45 to get the effect (and all other pieces are triggered effects, rather than permanent ones like this piece).
▲ Page top
RE: worn
QuoteReply
# Jan 15 2003 at 7:01 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758996819
37 posts
worn means you have to wear them for the effect, no clicky action. If you remove them the effect goes away.
▲ Page top
worn

Does it mean this effect won't be proc ?

works at level 24

# May 21 2002 at 12:00 PM Rating: Decent

7 posts
level 24 bard here and these guantlets are working without casting.

Catatonik
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 25 2002 at 4:39 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Let me clear something obvious up, the effect is just like the song but you don't have to recast it for probably about 10 minutes which means that is can be dispelled, also a bard at level 1 can equip these but you can't cast the effect until level 45, like all Kunark armor. I suggest you don't try to drown your newbie friend before then.
RE: No.
QuoteReply
# Mar 30 2002 at 6:30 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592248756514
1 post
OMG!

You don't even know what are u talking about!

SS gauntlets have a permanent EB effect that works at lvl 1. You don't need to cast/recast it, and it can't be dispelled! Just equip your SS gauntlets and jump to the water. YOU WON'T DROWN.

I was able to buy one when I was lvl 20 or so, funded by my tailoring, and I have used them since then.
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Nov 06 2001 at 4:56 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591760325292

Samini
▲ Page top
drop
QuoteReply
# May 27 2001 at 4:05 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
with all this talk there snothink about the drop most other class armor from KC has a mob so think not random but could be wroung?
▲ Page top
RE: drop
QuoteReply
# Jun 27 2003 at 1:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
Actually, about half the class armor in Kunark is specific to a zone, but can drop off of a random type of mob. The other half drop off of not too rare named mobs in Seb and KC.

Exceptions are pants and breastplates; bps drop off of Trakanon, pants drop off of Venril Sathir (the real one, not the triggered one for the druid epic/iksar shaman quest).

This particular piece is a random drop from skeletal guardians in KC.

Except for monks (whose armor drops in Dalnir), all the class specific Kunark armor drops in Sebilis and KC.
▲ Page top
RE: drop
QuoteReply
# Jun 07 2001 at 7:55 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Drops of any random skeletal guardian. At least, that's what they dropped from last night.
▲ Page top
Great Item for the Price!
QuoteReply
# May 14 2001 at 10:07 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592756616511
Scholar
25 posts
Hello All,

The SingingSteel Gloves are a great item for the currant price of 500-1500pp [depending on your server]. They work from level 1 as far as I've been able to tell, and are a "Constant Effect," so they can never be dispelled. On top of the handy effect is a pile of AC, and as bards have this in-born tendency to be beat on, we need all the AC we can get. Well worth the lack of stats [as compaired to simerly priced gloves].
▲ Page top
Any lvl
QuoteReply
# Apr 20 2001 at 1:05 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Got a pair of these last night and gave em to my lvl 22 bard friend. Is there any minimum lvl or does he just jump in the lake and away he goes?



▲ Page top
RE: Any lvl
QuoteReply
# Jun 21 2001 at 1:18 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591755853213
Scholar
102 posts
Go jump in a lake. -grin- The fact that these are the only SS piece which (a) have a permanent effect and (b) therefore work on any bard lvl 1 and above makes them very, very nice. And the fact that they are available on many servers for under 1k, (I bought mine for 600), only sweetens the deal. The 5 dex and 1 cha on lambent gauntlets was very nice, and shall be missed, but I think the extra 4 ac, and perm enduring breath makes the switch palatable. :)

Xsi Kal
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 28 2001 at 12:44 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) As of the latest patch, 3/27/01, it no longer procs Enduring Breath. It now procs the level 26 fear song. One less song to twist I suppose. Still bummed at the level 45 proc though. =(
RE: NEW PROC AS OF LATEST PATCH!(3/27/01)
